data.title: Red Cat Stock Up Despite Mixed Q4 Earnings: Details
data.description: Red Cat Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: RCAT) experienced a fluctuation in its shares, ultimately rising in extended trading on Wednesday following the release of its fourth-quarter earnings report. The report revealed a mixed performance, with the company reporting a loss of 17 cents per share for the quarter, falling short of the analysts' projection of a 15-cent loss. However, quarterly revenue exceeded expectations, reaching $26.24 million compared to the estimated $23.92 million, marking a significant increase from the $1.26 million revenue reported in the same period last year. The full-year 2025 total also showed positive growth. The stock movement of RCAT is actively being monitored, and interested parties are urged to observe the price action. For further details, the complete story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Halliburton First Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call
data.description: Halliburton Company (NYSE: HAL) is set to hold a conference call on Tuesday, April 21, 2026, to talk about its financial performance for the first quarter of 2026. The call, starting at 8:00 a.m. CT (9:00 a.m. ET), will be accompanied by the release of a press statement on the first quarter earnings before the call. Interested individuals can access the press release on the Halliburton website at www.halliburton.com. The live webcast of the call will also be available on the website.

data.title: Iovance Biotherapeutics Reports Inducement Grants under NASDAQ Listing Rule 5635(c)(4)
data.description: On March 20, 2026, Iovance Biotherapeutics, Inc. revealed that the Company has given the green light for the issuance of inducement stock options on March 19, 2026, covering a total of 3,400 shares of Iovance’s common stock to a recently hired, non-executive staff member. Iovance, a biotech firm dedicated to pioneering, creating, and providing innovative polyclonal tumor infiltrating lymphocyte (“TIL”) treatments for cancer patients, made this announcement.

data.title: Dow Jones Breaks Lower As Oil Prices, Yields Soar; Trump Says Iran War End Not 'Acceptable'
data.description: Key stock market indexes recently dropped below critical long-term levels due to significant increases in both oil prices and bond yields. President Trump has indicated that he is not prepared to terminate the conflict with Iran. This development has led to a downward trend in the Dow Jones index. This information was reported by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Drops 450 Points; Nvidia, Palantir Sell Off (Live Coverage)
data.description: On Friday, the Dow Jones Index experienced a decline, adding to the losses seen throughout the week. Super Micro Computer faced significant losses in the stock market today. The stock market observed a drop of 450 points in the Dow, with companies like Nvidia and Palantir also experiencing a sell-off.

data.title: Integral Metals Announces Marketing Program
data.description: Integral Metals Corp., headquartered in Calgary, Alberta, disclosed its engagement of Rumble Strip Media Inc. for marketing services. The company's trading symbols are CSE: INTG, OTC: ITGLF, and FSE: ZK9. The address for Rumble Strip is Unit 893, 250-997 Seymour Street, Vancouver, British Columbia. The marketing services are expected to span 45 days starting around March 23, 2026, with potential for extension or contraction at the management's discretion.

data.title: HM Exploration Announces $1.5 Million LIFE Flow-Through Offering
data.description: VANCOUVER, BC, 20 March 2026 - HM Exploration Corp. ("HM Exploration" or "HM" or the "Company") is aiming to conduct a non-brokered private placement to raise a total of approximately C$1.5 million. The funding will be generated through the sale of a maximum of 2,955,666 "flow-through" units of the Company, referred to as "FT Units," at a rate of C$0.5075 per FT Unit. This fundraising initiative, named the "LIFE Offering," will be carried out on a charity flow-through basis. The Company plans to utilize the Listed Issuer Financing Exemption for this purpose.

data.title: LGI Homes Celebrates Grand Opening of Goldfields Ranch in Linda, California
data.description: LGI Homes is excited to introduce the grand opening of Goldfields Ranch, a new community located in Linda, California. This development offers residents a vibrant living experience and features a range of modern amenities. With a total of 200 housing units available, Goldfields Ranch promises a thriving community atmosphere for its residents.

data.title: CECO Environmental and Thermon to Host Joint CEO Fireside Chat at Upcoming Roth Conference
data.description: CECO Environmental Corp. (Nasdaq: CECO) and Thermon Group Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: THR) will host a joint fireside chat featuring both CEOs at the 38th Annual Roth Conference on March 23, 2026, at 4:00 PM PDT. CECO is an industrial company dedicated to environmental protection, while Thermon specializes in industrial process heating solutions. This event is set to provide insights into these leading companies and their contributions to environmental protection and industrial technology.

data.title: BHAV Acquisition Corp Announces Closing of $100 Million Initial Public Offering
data.description: PISCATAWAY, N.J., March 20, 2026 - Today, BHAV Acquisition Corp disclosed the conclusion of its initial public offering, which involved 10,000,000 units sold at an offering price of $10.00 per unit. Each unit comprises one Class A ordinary share and one right. Holders of rights are entitled to one-fourth of a Class A ordinary share after the Company's initial business combination. $10.00 per unit was placed in a trust account with Continental Stock Transfer & Trust Company as trustee. Trading of the units commenced on March 19, 2026, on the Nasdaq Global Market under the ticker symbol “BHAVU.” Following the separate trading of the securities, it is anticipated that the Class A ordinary shares and rights will trade on Nasdaq under the symbols “BHAV” and “BHAVR,” respectively.
